en.cmd.help.tools_on:
:tools on comm                    Enable communication tools (Teams, Discord)
  :tools on office                  Enable Office tools (Excel, Word, etc.)
  :tools on devel                   Enable development tools (lint, py_compile, tests)
en.cmd.help.tools_off:
:tools off comm                   Disable communication tools (Teams, Discord)
  :tools off office                 Disable Office tools (Excel, Word, etc.)
  :tools off devel                  Disable development tools (lint, py_compile, tests)
en.tool.description: Dummy tool for tools control command registration.
